candidates.why: The only explicit D&A row appears as a separate operating line item after Gross profit and alongside Administrative Expenses/Other expenses, not as a COGS sub-component or COGS-labelled depreciation line. Relative to the selected COGS bucket 'Cost of Revenues - Total', this does not clearly belong to COGS.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS/cost-of-revenues depreciation or amortisation row is shown. The separate 'Depreciation' line appears outside the selected COGS row and is not clearly attributable to COGS, so do not add any COGS D&A separately.

candidates.why: A populated 'Depreciation' line appears as a separate operating expense line at the same level as Administrative Expenses rather than as an indented sub-component of the selected XSGA bucket 'Administrative Expenses'. This suggests D&A is not already embedded in the selected parent row and should be added separately to operating overhead/SG&A.

variables.notes: Selected the standalone operating 'Depreciation' row for XSGA_DA because it appears separate from, not contained within, the selected 'Administrative Expenses' row. No separate R&D row is visible, and there is no more granular SG&A D&A summary/component conflict to resolve.
